title: How do I get approved to sell in restricted categories?
bodyHtml:
If you’d like to start selling Apple headphones, MacBook chargers, or Apple Pencils on Back Market, you’ll need to go through our approval process. Note that rules have been updated in August 2023 for Apple headphones in particular. 

While all our sellers on Back Market have proven their high standards, many original suppliers attempt to sell counterfeit devices in these categories. This means you’ll need to make sure your source is 100% reliable and educate yourself on the risks of counterfeit items before you apply to sell them on Back Market.

Check out this article to learn more about testing for counterfeit AirPods

In order to apply, follow these steps.


Jump to

Apple headphones (AirPod, AirPod Pro, AirPod Max)
MacBook chargers and Apple Pencils


Apple headphones (AirPod, AirPod Pro, AirPod Max)

Please note that these guidelines were updated in August 2023 due to high levels of potential counterfeit and defective devices. 

To get approved to sell Apple headphones (including AirPod, AirPod Pro, and AirPod Max), you must have:

  • Overall sales of 650.000€ (650K) or above in the 90 days prior to your application date.
  • A history of selling on the platform for more than 6 months.

When you meet these qualifications, submit an application form. Here's how:

 

  1. Complete the application form on Google Sheets
  2. Review the 10-control-point test linked in the Google Sheet. Make sure you’re using it when testing your AirPods.
  3. Send a request through the Seller Support Center.
  4. When asked if your request is order related, select “No”.
  5. When asked what your request is about, click “Listings”.
  6. When asked what you want to do, click “Apply to sell restricted items”.
  7. When asked for the category, click “AirPods”.
  8. Attach your completed application form to the request.


MacBook chargers and Apple Pencils

  1. Send a sample to Back Market’s Innovation Labs in either New York or Bordeaux. Make sure to keep the tracking number and proof of purchase.

Back Market Innovation Lab

41 Union Square W

2nd floor

New York, NY 10003

 

Back Market Innovation Lab

123 Rue Lucien Faure

33300 Bordeaux

France


2. Submit a request through the Seller Support Center.

3. When asked if your request is order related, select “No”.

4. When asked what your request is about, select “Listings”.

5. When asked what you want to do, select “Apply to sell restricted items”.

6. When asked for the category you want to sell, select “MacBook chargers or Apple Pencils.”

7. Include your tracking number and receipt or proof of purchase in the request.
